text: Texas judge declines to close Camp Mystic, but bars construction on campus hit by flooding - NBC News
fullText: A Texas judge on Wednesday declined to fully close Camp Mystic — the tragic epicenter of the July 4 floods that inundated the Texas Hill Country last year — but prevented the part of the camp where the deadly flooding occurred from being altered.
